tool: browser-use in-app browser via node_repl iab backend

criticalFindings.evidence: Opening Security Advisor Sprint in the assignment editor and allowing the builder save path caused the assignment to appear as draft in Matching and removed assignment details from the public trust card.
criticalFindings.localFix: Patched assignment builder to preserve active status when saving an existing active assignment from the editor.

criticalFindings.evidence: The active assignment review page rendered repeated TTFQI / Target: 72h outcome rows many times before the assignment became draft.
criticalFindings.localFix: Not fixed in this pass; likely needs data cleanup or outcome rendering guard.

productionRestoreNeeded.restoreActionNeedsConfirmation: Click Publish Assignment for Security Advisor Sprint or run an explicit approved production restore/update.
